creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
Stan Barber writes:
> I would name it DNSCheck if that works for the ports tree. I think  there is something called dnscheck that is already there. Is it possible to use DNSCheck?

Sorry for the delay in replying. You can rename it to DNSCheck, but then make
sure executables of your port don't conflict with executables of existing
'dnscheck' port. Why not rename it 'dns/checkdns-se' as you mentioned in the
subject of the PR ? And adding a PREFIX like 'se-' to the executables iff they
conflict with 'dnscheck' port.

HTH
--
